text.title: Agent Observability Stack Blueprint Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-observability-stack-blueprint. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Inventory current LLM calls, tool calls, retrieval calls; map to a span tree.
step.description: Input: agent source. Action: Annotate code paths.. Output: span map.

step.name: Pick vendor by r5 decision tree.
step.description: Input: span map + constraints. Action: Apply decision tree.. Output: vendor decision.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: span map + constraints.

step.name: Wire OTel SDK; emit spans for LLM/tool/retrieval.
step.description: Input: vendor decision. Action: Add SDK + instrumentation.. Output: OTel live.

step.name: Build cost ledger schema and write-path.
step.description: Input: OTel live. Action: Author cost tagging.. Output: ledger live.

step.name: Wire LLM-judge sampler + drift dashboard with r3/r4 thresholds.
step.description: Input: ledger live. Action: Author sampler + dashboard.. Output: judge + dashboard.

step.name: Document runbook: how to investigate a drift alert.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Write runbook.. Output: runbook.
